title: Cosmetic Armor Updated
description: Adds 4 Trinkets slots for visual armor overrides.
body:
# Cosmetic Armor Updated ___ [![modrinth_icon]][modrinth_link] [![curseforge_icon]][curseforge_link][![github_icon]][github_link]
___ ___ ## About Updated version of Apace's original [Cosmetic Armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmetic-armor) mod for Fabric 1.21.x to 26.1.x. Cosmetic Armor Updated adds a cosmetic Trinket slot for each armor slot. Placing a piece of armor in a cosmetic slot will only **visually** override the armor worn in the armor slot, without affecting the main armor capabilities. ![Screenshot showing the survival inventory with the mod's visual armor slots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aaad18817f5911a36bdf01416b61d7fa4828c55c.png) ___ ## Required mods ___ ### Minecraft 26.1 and 26.1.1 Versions 26.1 and 26.1.1 require Patbox's [Trinkets Updated]. **Cardinal Components API is no longer required.** ### Minecraft 1.21.11 Version 1.21.11 require Patbox's [Trinkets Updated] and [Cardinal Components API]. ### Minecraft 1.21.4 to 1.21.10 Versions ranging from 1.21.4 to 1.21.10 included require Ryhon's [Trinkets Canary](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets-canary) and [Cardinal Components API]. ### Minecraft 1.21.2 and 1.21.3 Minecraft versions 1.21.2 and 1.21.3 are not supported as no compatible versions of Trinkets are available. ### Minecraft 1.21 and 1.21.1 Versions 1.21 and 1.21.1 require Emi's original [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) mod and [Cardinal Components API]. ___ _This fork of Cosmetic Armor will be archived if Apace ever uploads updates._ [github_icon]: https://github.com/Mhaks02/images/blob/main/github_icon_x96.png?raw=true [github_link]: https://github.com/Mhaks02/cosmetic-armor [curseforge_icon]: https://github.com/Mhaks02/images/blob/main/curseforge_icon_x96.png?raw=true [curseforge_link]: https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-updated [modrinth_icon]: https://github.com/Mhaks02/images/blob/main/modrinth_icon_x96.png?raw=true [modrinth_link]: https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmetic-armor-updated [Cardinal Components API]: https://modrinth.com/mod/cardinal-components-api [Trinkets Updated]: https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets-updated
